body:
Use http://github.com/deep-foundation/sdk

And make sure it builds electron application for https://github.com/konard/vk-bot, that will work on macOS, Windows, Linux.

It should work with all enabled by default features of vk-bot in index.js:
- sending posts to pr communities (but simplifed to only avatar of the user + `Приму заявки в друзья.` simple text).
- birthday congratulations (with simple default 10 messages similar to "Поздравляю с днём рождения!", with different emojis, but not to much of them not more than 2 per message.)
- online status while it is working
- auto accept friend requests (if below < 10000, we should accept only top 10% of friends requests with most common friends, if above > 10000 (friends limit), we should accept friend requests with people with whom we have most common friends).
- automatic clean up - delete blocked
- and configurable priority list to automatically send request and don't delete on blocked

Copy not all the code, but just enough to fully support these basic features, prefer code copy, but you can do deduplication, remove comments and unused features and code.

Application should support 2 modes of operation automatic installation of script on server using SSH (docker), and local startup without docker. (with automatic installation of all dependencies).

Verbose logging by default so it will be easy for users to make bug reports. Logs should strip out tokens/passwords and so on.

It should contain minimum configuration preferably 1 screen window, with ability to switch between local and server mode, start/stop buttons and all configuration related to selected mode with explanation of how it works and why each piece of data is needed. It should be described in simple language. And should support light and dark theme (auto detect), en and ru languages (auto detect) by default.

So this would be minimum functional package, that is easy to use and test.

We should produce GitHub releases with links to downloadable and installable artifacts directly to user's target machine. And use some signature, that will verify that source code is matches with the distribution.

So as the result I should get GitHub release of 0.0.1 version, that I can download to my local desktop system and test it locally, or if I provide credentials for ssh server, it should install everything there.

We should support start via http://github.com/link-foundation/start (so we support start via screen and docker), so we can reduce resources needed for the server installation if installed via screen.

We should also use http://github.com/link-foundation/lino-arguments pattern, to support lino (links notation) configuration and options.

And use http://github.com/link-foundation/lino-objects-codec for saved state and configuration of the application, so it remembers the state between restarts.

So we need to have layered configuration local folder for development, that overrides global application folder configuration.

For cache we should use http://github.com/link-foundation/lino-objects-codec (with human readable indented format without types specification). So we don't use json for any data stored or used by application. Instead we use Links Notation, in the most human readable for possible (white space and indentation instead of brackets and parentheses).

Cache by default is stored in application folder.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: React.js electron application for https://github.com/konard/vk-bot
